# MOLT AIM LIBRARY v1.0.0

This is the grouped HUMAN/library view for the AIM family in the public UMG Block Library lane.

## Family role
AIM blocks define the target outcome, destination, or success condition that the system is orienting toward.

## Use AIM when you want to describe
- the goal being pursued
- the outcome to optimize for
- the mission shape of a behavior
- the end state that gives direction to the rest of the block bundle

## Family relationship
- AIM = destination
- NEED = requirement
- USE = application
- DIRECTIVE = action command
- BLUEPRINT = structure
- INSTRUCTION = procedure

## Machine-facing paired file
- `../../blocks/molt/subjects/aim.library.v1.0.0.json`
